overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk along a waterfront promenade in a futuristic city. The player character moves along wet wooden docks past illuminated billboards for Arasaka and other brands, with modern glass buildings rising in the background, eventually approaching a rooftop bar entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with approaching neon billboards

events.description: large illuminated billboards for Arasaka and Real Man's Smell come into clear view ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront dock toward the illuminated billboards

entered.detail: dark water reflecting city lights along the left side of the walkway
wet wooden dock planks with metal railings
large curved modern glass building with illuminated windows
large digital billboard displaying Arasaka corporation logo with white figures
illuminated advertisement billboard with text REAL MAN'S SMELL
tall modern street lamps with white light

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark waterfront promenade at night, with the camera moving forward along wet wooden docks. To the left, dark water reflects the city lights, while modern glass buildings rise on the right. Ahead, large illuminated billboards for Arasaka and other brands become visible, growing larger as the player approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow dock passage between water and billboard wall

events.description: passing alongside the large billboards, which dominate the right side of the frame

agents.ego_description: walking past the massive illuminated billboards, moving through the narrow corridor between water and wall

entered.detail: stacked metal cargo containers with illuminated edges

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a narrow passage between the water and the massive illuminated billboards. The Arasaka and Real Man's Smell advertisements tower overhead on the right, casting colored light on the walkway. Shipping containers appear on the left, and the large waterfront building looms closer ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open dock area with shipping containers and building entrance

events.description: approaching access ramp leading up to elevated building entrance

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dock toward a building entrance, passing shipping containers

entered.detail: illuminated doorway with glass facade leading into the waterfront building
sloped wooden ramp with metal railings leading upward

segments.scene_description: Having passed the billboards, the scene opens into a wider dock area with the waterfront building now dominating the right side. Shipping containers line the left side of the path. The player approaches an access ramp leading up to an elevated entrance, with the water still visible to the left.

events.description: arriving at outdoor bar area with seating and illuminated counter

agents.ego_description: walking up the ramp and approaching the bar entrance, moving toward the outdoor seating area

entered.detail: dark entranceway with warm interior lighting and glass doors
high stools and tables arranged outside the bar
circular metal table with candles on top
tall green plants in planters along the railing
black metal safety railings along the walkway edge

segments.scene_description: The player ascends the ramp to an elevated walkway, leaving the water behind. The scene becomes more sheltered under the building overhang. Approaching the bar entrance, the camera reveals outdoor seating with a round table and stools, potted plants along the railings, and warm interior lighting inviting entry.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a dark waterfront promenade that gradually becomes dominated by towering, neon-lit corporate advertisements. It begins on wet wooden docks where the camera glides between the reflective dark water on the left and modern glass buildings on the right. As the camera advances, the distant glow of large illuminated billboards for Arasaka and other brands grows larger, drawing the viewer deeper into the city's light. The scene then shifts into a narrow passage where these massive advertisements, including Real Man's Smell, tower overhead and cast vibrant colored light across the walkway. Finally, the path tightens between the glowing displays and a row of shipping containers as a large waterfront building looms closer ahead.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open waterfront dock toward the sheltered entrance of an elevated rooftop bar. It begins by moving past illuminated billboards into a wider dock area, where shipping containers line the left and a large waterfront building dominates the right. As the camera approaches an access ramp, the view of the water persists until the player ascends toward the building's upper level. The scene then shifts from the open air to a more enclosed space under a building overhang, leaving the harbor behind. Finally, the camera reveals an outdoor seating area with round tables, stools, and potted plants, drawing closer to the warm interior lighting of the bar entrance.
